case_title: KENT, LURCRETIA CONNELLY vs. SAN PEDRO, JOHN DBA PRESTIGE MODEL & TALENT et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENT, LURCRETIA CONNELLY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN PEDRO, JOHN DBA PRESTIGE MODEL & TALENT MANAGEMENT SAN PEDRO, DARLENE DBA PRESTIGE MODEL & TALENT MANAGEMENT SAN PEDRO, DARLENE, INDIVIDUALLY
